channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 ps5-linux/ps5-linux-loader (586 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ps5-linux

📝 Repository: ps5-linux/ps5-linux-loader

📄 Descrizione: Linux payload implementing the HV exploit and a custom bootloader

⭐ Stelle: 586

🍴 Forks: 34

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-24T13:19:30Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-30T05:09:17Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 tgies/copy-fail-c (285 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tgies

📝 Repository: tgies/copy-fail-c

📄 Descrizione: Cross-platform C port of the Copy Fail Linux LPE (CVE-2026-31431). Disclosed 2026-04-29 by Theori / Xint.

⭐ Stelle: 285

🍴 Forks: 79

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: af-alg copy-fail cve-2026-31431 exploit kernel-exploit linux-kernel local-privilege-escalation nolibc portable-c privilege-escalation proof-of-concept security-research

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-29T23:29:14Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-05T04:08:35Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 AlexCheema/talos-vs-macbook (142 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: AlexCheema

📝 Repository: AlexCheema/talos-vs-macbook

📄 Descrizione: microGPT benchmarks: a single M4 Max MacBook Pro P-core in C runs Karpathy's 4192-parameter transformer at ~71x the throughput of TALOS-V2's FPGA implementation.

⭐ Stelle: 142

🍴 Forks: 9

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: MIT License

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: avx-512 avx2 biometrics c99 computer-vision cpu-inference deep-learning edge-ai embedded-ai face-embedding face-recognition face-verification low-latency onnx-runtime production-ready simd zero-dependencies

item.title: 📝 Percivalll/Copy-Fail-CVE-2026-31431-Kubernetes-PoC (50 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Percivalll

📝 Repository: Percivalll/Copy-Fail-CVE-2026-31431-Kubernetes-PoC

📄 Descrizione: PoC: fully unprivileged container escape to node-level code execution on Kubernetes via CVE-2026-31431 page-cache corruption + shared image layers. Validated on Alibaba Cloud ACK and Amazon EKS.

⭐ Stelle: 50

🍴 Forks: 14

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: container-escape cve-2026-31431 eks exploit kubernetes linux-kernel privilege-escalation proof-of-concept security-research vulnerability

item.title: 📝 MikeWuPing/UEFI_SuperMario (17 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: MikeWuPing

📝 Repository: MikeWuPing/UEFI_SuperMario

📄 Descrizione: 将红白机（NES）《超级马力欧兄弟》（Super Mario Bros）移植到 **UEFI Shell** 环境下运行。图形输出使用 UEFI GOP（Graphics Output Protocol），纯软件渲染，无音频依赖。可在 QEMU + OVMF 或真机 UEFI Shell 下运行。A port of the NES classic "Super Mario Bros" to the **UEFI Shell** environment. Uses UEFI GOP for graphics, pure software rendering, no audio. Runs on QEMU + OVMF or bare-metal UEFI systems.

⭐ Stelle: 17

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-03T09:10:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-06T05:04:54Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: marceld23

📝 Repository: marceld23/Pixel-Pets

📄 Descrizione: Pixel-Pets: A local, open-source virtual pet ecosystem on M5Stack. 100% AI-authored C++ (Claude) by a 10yo maker. Includes Muffin (LLM), Visu & Goo-Goo variants + companion device Pip. Built for privacy, education, and offline play.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: No license
